mapper.insert: INSERT INTO drivers (tenant_id, region_id, name, phone, vehicle_type_id, license_plate, status_id, add_date) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{regionId}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{vehicleTypeId}, #{licensePlate}, #{statusId}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM drivers WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_info IS NULL
SELECT * FROM drivers WHERE phone = #{phone} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND delete_info IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE drivers SET status_id = #{statusId}, update_date = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_info IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO driver_current_locations (driver_id, lat, lng, update_date) VALUES (#{driverId}, #{lat}, #{lng}, NOW()) ON CONFLICT (driver_id) DO UPDATE SET lat = #{lat}, lng = #{lng}, update_date = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT d.*, (6371 * acos( cos(radians(#{lat})) * cos(radians(dcl.lat)) * cos(radians(dcl.lng) - radians(#{lng})) + sin(radians(#{lat})) * sin(radians(dcl.lat)) )) AS distance_km FROM drivers d INNER JOIN driver_current_locations dcl ON d.id = dcl.driver_id WHERE d.status_id = 101 AND d.vehicle_type_id = #{vehicleTypeId} AND d.delete_info IS NULL AND (6371 * acos( cos(radians(#{lat})) * cos(radians(dcl.lat)) * cos(radians(dcl.lng) - radians(#{lng})) + sin(radians(#{lat})) * sin(radians(dcl.lat)) )) <= #{radiusKm} ORDER BY distance_km ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO driver_locations (driver_id, lat, lng, recorded_at) VALUES (#{driverId}, #{lat}, #{lng}, NOW())
